data.body:
Additional enrichment from onboarding remediation brainstorm (2026-04-13, item 2):

Homebrew and Claude Code are prerequisites to installing the DSO plugin. INSTALL.md must clearly state these as blocking prerequisites that must be installed before proceeding with plugin installation. This was identified during the dependency pre-scan discussion — the onboarding skill epic explicitly scopes non-Homebrew fallback as out of scope, so the documentation must make the Homebrew prerequisite unambiguous.
